diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,191 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Primary Hono class that extends HonoBase, sets up default router (SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks), exports Hono class
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoOptions, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: Entry point that composes router and provides class-based API for request handling
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class implementation providing request dispatch, handler composition, error handling, route registration, mounting, path management, cloning
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoOptions, compose, Context, Router, HonoBase, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Middleware, NotFoundHandler, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, COMPOSED_HANDLER
+- Simple note: Handles request flow, middleware execution, error responses, route grouping via #addRoute, #dispatch, clone, basePath, route methods
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter module entry point, exports PatternRouter class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that re-exports the main router implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation that converts path patterns to regex and matches requests using regex-based pattern matching
+- Names noticed: Route, PatternRouter, emptyParams, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, endsWithWildcard, REGEXP_CONSTRUCTION
+- Simple note: Pre-processes paths during add() to build regex patterns, matches all registered routes on each request in match()
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter module entry point, exports LinearRouter class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that re-exports the main router implementation
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation that stores routes in a linear list and attempts matches sequentially until successful, supports wildcards and labeled params with regex
+- Names noticed: Route, LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, ROUTES_MATCHING, PARAM_EXTRACTION
+- Simple note: O(n) matching where n is number of routes, can be slow with many routes, allows labeled params with lookahead for validation
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter module entry point, exports RegExpRouter class and PreparedRegExpRouter helper
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Router that builds regex from routes once and reuses the matcher without rebuilding
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter that preprocesses routes into a trie, builds optimized regex with param indexes, stores matcher for fast request matching
+- Names noticed: HandlerWithMetadata, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, PATH_ERROR, StaticMap, Matcher, matcher
+- Simple note: Separates route registration from matching, compiles regex once during add(), matches instantly during match() using pre-compiled patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher type structure and match function that routes incoming requests to handlers using compiled regex and static match fallback
+- Names noticed: HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, RESULT_TYPES, static match, regexp match, PARAM_INDEX_RELOCATION
+- Simple note: Two-tier matching: first tries static route match, then uses regex if no static match, returns handlers with param index references
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter class that pre-construcs matchers for deployment in serialization scenarios, relocates handlers as routes are added during runtime
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, add, match, buildAllMatchers, matcher
+- Simple note: Designed for deployment where router state needs to be serialized, batches all paths initially, adds paths at runtime via relocateMap
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class for trie structure in reg-exp-router, implements token-based path insertion and regex construction per node
+- Names noticed: Node, PATH_ERROR, Context, compareKey, insert, buildRegExpStr, CHILD_SORTING, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR
+- Simple note: Builds path tree incrementally, assigns capture index to each label, outputs combined regex string via DFS traversal
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that parses path strings into token arrays and constructs trie, handles pattern extraction and parameter associations
+- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Node, insert, buildRegExp, groups, tokens, replacement maps, capture index
+- Simple note: Pre-processes paths by converting to token sequences, extracts named parameters and their patterns, feeds tokens to Node for trie construction
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter module entry point, exports SmartRouter class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that re-exports the main router implementation
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter that wraps multiple routers, delegates to one per request and caches active router after successful match
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, ROUTER_DELEGATION, routers, routes, activeRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: Lazy routing strategy, tries each registered router until one matches, then fixes match method and keeps only that router for future requests
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter module entry point, exports TrieRouter class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that re-exports the main router implementation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter implementation based on trie node search, handles named parameters with param reset on each search
+- Names noticed: Node, TrieRouter, METHOD_NAME_ALL, checkOptionalParameter, search
+- Simple note: Pure trie-based matching, O(depth) lookup, each search starts fresh with empty params, supports named params and wildcards
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation with search algorithm, maintains param context per node, sorts handlers by score for deterministic multi-match order
+- Names noticed: HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, Node, emptyParams, hasChildren, METHOD_NAME_ALL, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, insert, search, partOffsets, PATTERN_MATCHING, HANDLER_SET_PUSHING
+- Simple note: Node-based tree walk for path matching, BFS-like with queue for pattern branching, collects all matching handlers, sorts by insertion order
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite helper that wraps router tests with skip logic for known failures, initializes router and match helper
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, runTest, getSuiteHierarchy, router, match, skip, beforeEach, expect
+- Simple note: Common test infrastructure used by all router test files, handles test skipping based on parent suite and name
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter tests covering duplicate param self-error, trailing slash allows both with and without
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, skip, beforeEach, it
+- Simple note: Two core tests, self duplicates throw error but /foo:/:foo and /foo are allowed, no complex test suite coverage
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter tests cover multi-match params per handler error, trailing slash, skip part matching
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, skip, beforeEach, it
+- Simple note: Skips complex param-per-handler and regexp-capture cases, passes trailing slash test, validates partial path matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter tests for unsupported path error scenarios including duplicate params and complex group failures, return type tests
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, ParamStash, skip, describe, it, match
+- Simple note: Most restrictive router, fails on almost all multi-match tests, allows return type testing with stash, specific edge case coverage
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter thin test that runs common test suite with RegExpRouter + TrieRouter combination
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest, newRouter
+- Simple note: Single describe block delegates all common tests to hybrid router, no custom tests in this file
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter tests passing all common cases with custom skip for none, validates node-level search behavior
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, Node, search
+- Simple note: Most permissive router in common tests, passes entire common suite, includes detailed Node test at root
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Comprehensive Node test coverage including Root, Usage, Param prefix, Wildcard, Regexp, Multi match, Sort Order, Duplicate params, star
+- Names mentioned: Node, insert, search, get, post, put, delete, ALL, *, static routes, wildcard, regexp, named params, multi-match handlers, handler score, PARAM_RESET
+- Simple note: Largest test file with 300+ lines, tests each algorithmic edge case extensively including sorting, param scoping, and complex regex patterns
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+## pattern-router
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+## linear-router
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+## reg-exp-router
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+## smart-router
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+## trie-router
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+## Shared Modules
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+---
+
+## File Paths Reference
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+---
+
+Only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
